programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Encounter
programme.desc: Guest star Elizabeth Ashley plays the alcoholic wife of a crime syndicate leader whose involvement in an intimidation racket and the cold-blooded murder of an employee puts the IMF team on his trail.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Underwater
programme.desc: Stolen gems worth seventy-five million dollars scheduled to be fenced to an underworld figure suddenly disappear and the ship on which they were being transported is blown up at sea bringing the IMF team into the picture.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Invasion
programme.desc: Guest star Kevin McCarthy plays the role of a highly-placed Defense Department advisor who has murdered an Air Force official and sold vital top-secret material about America's nuclear defenses to foreign powers.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blues
programme.desc: Barney poses as a prospective rock-music recording artist to get evidence linking an organized crime figurehead played by guest star William Windom to the sudden death of a beautiful recording star who was being blackmailed by the syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Visitors
programme.desc: Guest star Steve Forrest plays the role of a millionaire publisher and communications tycoon who has sold fifty-one percent of his empire to an underworld crime syndicate which gives them a powerful influence over state politics.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Risk & Reward
programme.desc: Ton & Allen arrive late to an auction. They uncover vintage bear traps and a bounty of street art. If the pieces belong to the artist, RISK, it could be their biggest score ever. If not, they'll be stuck with forged knockoffs.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Space Cowboys
programme.desc: With the pawn shop history, Ton and Allen start the next chapter of their careers with a bang. They uncover an antique WWII firearm and a Russian cosmonaut space suit, which could be their biggest find to date...if it's real.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton Voyage
programme.desc: When a ruthless storeowner seems hell-bent on stopping Ton & Allen from scoring new items in Santa Barbara they fight back. The guys uncover a rare antique air-gun and a vintage wooden boat built for speed, if it floats!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Whip It Good
programme.desc: With a motocross bike and a rare stock whip up for grabs, Ton and Allen face one of their toughest competitors yet: their former employee Carolyn, who knows all their tricks, has money to burn and is out for revenge.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Family Phantoms
programme.desc: Meet the ghosts of a mother and aunt who make life difficult for the living.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: A Sense of Evil
programme.desc: Hear from terrified people who wish their sixth sense wasn’t quite so good.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: When Ghosts Get Physical
programme.desc: Witness a poltergeist become aggressive while a ghost makes a deadly return.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Renos from Hell
programme.desc: Discover why a mansion was so cheap, and meet a spooky entity in a basement.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Evil Intentions
programme.desc: Visit a haunted tattoo shop and witness a supernatural family reunion.

programme.title: A Haunting: Nightmare In Bridgeport
programme.desc: Connecticut child safety specialist Bob Baker has devoted his life to protecting children from natural and supernatural harm. When his mother starts hearing voices in his childhood home, Bob is faced with a demon that evolves from his own nightmares.

programme.title: A Haunting: Masks Of Terror
programme.desc: Jeanette Osborne treats herself to a set of Haitian masks to decorate her California dream home. But shortly after, strange activity leads her to conclude that the masks are to blame.

programme.title: A Haunting: Conjuring Evil
programme.desc: Harold and Cindy have found the perfect retreat in suburban Alaska for their family. But after their daughter begins to experiment in witchcraft, she unknowingly attracts the attention of a dark entity. Harold calls in experts to help reclaim the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Grave Awakenings
programme.desc: When ghosts confront Zoe Dei, she makes the harrowing discovery that her home harbors a paranormal portal which has awakened her dormant ability as psychic medium, forcing her to learn how to live with her newfound ability to see the dead.

programme.title: A Haunting: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Strange sounds and eerie sensations lead Charles Gonzales to suspect that a spirit haunts his Florida home. Charles asks Desiree to investigate his home. There, Desiree encounters the vicious spirit who seeks to keep Charles in its clutches forever.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Romie moves into a new home but begins to have nightmares and see shadowy spirits pacing.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao's Fire Navy fleet. Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn't a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Zhao's invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe's defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful `Avatar State' as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation. But it's more difficult than Aang thinks.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: On the way to Omashu, the kids meet some nomads who show them a shortcut through the `cave of two lovers'. When they get lost in the caves, they must trust in love to escape.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The kids return to Omashu so that Aang can learn Earthbending from King Bumi; however, when they get there, they are shocked to find the city is now in Fire Nation hands.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being `connected to the Earth' from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: The Hobbit, Limb Generation, Mind Over Matter
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. The Hobbit, Limb Generation, Mind Over Matter: A look at the future of mind control, an extinct hobbit race and whether humans can regenerate limbs.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Alien Encounters: A cow is mutilated, a man is repeatedly abducted from his bed, and an astronomer's telescope intercepts a mysterious message.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Life After Death
programme.desc: Life After Death: Scientists in England conduct groundbreaking séances, while someone returns from the grave.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Monsters
programme.desc: Monsters: A fisherman uncovers the remains of an unidentified sea creature on a beach, and a hairy creature causes panic in New Delhi.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: The End Of The World
programme.desc: The End of the World: Decoding Mayan texts, a physicist predicts a cataclysm will destroy the world. A NASA scientist makes an alien discovery.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Parallel Worlds
programme.desc: Parallel Worlds: While hiking, a woman has a terrifying encounter with an entity from another world.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Plowright
programme.desc: Keen traveller Sandy hopes a lifetime of collecting can help fund a trip to the Antarctic.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Lowes
programme.desc: Anne Lowes needs help funding her daughter Felicity's university education in America.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Nightingale
programme.desc: Retired accountant Evie wants to fund a bedroom makeover.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Miller
programme.desc: Chris Hollins and Paul Hayes help a woman raise money for a trip to Canada.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Petit
programme.desc: Banoo Petit hopes to sell mementos to raise funds for replacement windows.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Among the guests on Graham's sofa are comic actor Stephen Mangan from new TV show `Hang-Ups', and music from Jess Glynne, who performs her new single `I'll Be There'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa are rock star Sir Elton John, actor and writer Stephen Fry, actress Carey Mulligan, pop star Robbie Williams, singer-songwriter P!nk, who performs 'What About Us'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham is joined on the sofa by Meryl Streep, playing the socialite turned (tuneless) opera singer in `Florence Foster Jenkins', her co-star in the film, the great Hugh Grant, and actor Keeley Hawes, promoting new drama series `The Durrells'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa are 'Thor' star Chris Hemsworth, music legend Gloria Estefan talking about her musical 'On Your Feet', 'Doctor Who' star David Tennant and Welsh actor Michael Sheen. With music from Jonas Brothers, performing 'Sucker'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Guests include Ethan Hawke, starring in 'First Reformed', Toni Collette, starring in 'Hereditary', and Aidan Turner, who is on the West End with 'The Lieutenant of Inishmore'. Jo Brand talks about her new film, plus there's music from Liam Payne.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Colin Farrell, Rachel Weisz, Dawn French, Chris O'Dowd join Graham on the sofa. With a performance from Rod Stewart.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ross Kemp
programme.desc: A courageous man who's living proof you can reinvent yourself more times than a Love Island contestant. He went from pulling pints in the Queen Vic to pulling BAFTAs for documentaries…

programme.title: Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Lucy Bronze
programme.desc: Tonight’s guest has lived that journey. From a football-loving kid to one of the world’s finest players, she’s lifted major trophies, captained teams, and become a role model for millions. Lucy Bronze welcome on the Yellow Couch.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Charlotte Crosby

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ben Whittaker

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ramanodge Unmathallegadoo
programme.desc: At the age of 16, Sana Muhammad had an arranged marriage to Ramanodge Unmathallegadoo, a man almost twice her age. She managed to escape the unhappy relationship and found new love, but Ramanodge decided she would never get to enjoy her new life.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Frances Hall
programme.desc: When Frances Araiza met Bill Hall Jr, he was a 16 year old with big ideas. Fast forward three decades and they were grandparents with a multi-million dollar empire. But behind closed doors, their marriage story was heading for an explosive finale.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Faria Khan
programme.desc: After leaving an arranged marriage she claimed was abusive, Faria Khan could have moved on. But she wouldn’t be satisfied until estranged husband Nawajid was dead. And she knew exactly who to ask to help her.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Steven McDowell
programme.desc: Steven and Crystal McDowell were never a good match, and for years after they split, Steven deluded himself that reconciliation was just around the corner. Then, Crystal disappeared during a deadly hurricane. Was she the victim of a natural disaster?

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Glyn Dix
programme.desc: Glyn Dix met Hazel while he was serving a life term for a brutal rape and murder. After convincing her he had been framed, the couple fell for one another. But five years after his release from prison, Glyn finally showed Hazel his true colours.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Colleagues and customers at the pharmacy owned by Jessica and Mitesh Patel recall how abusive, controlling and sometimes violent Mitesh was towards his wife. But they had no idea that he was hatching a plan to brutally end the marriage.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Deadly Envy
programme.desc: An aspiring Hollywood actress is reacquainted with an old friend and fellow actress who becomes deeply jealous of her beauty and success.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Bogeyman
programme.desc: Sherry Meinberg is living the innocent life of a teen in the 1950s when she meets handsome Chuck Gray. But the man of her dreams soon turns into a monster.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: Vernetta is stalked by her abusive ex-husband, Richard, after she kicks him out of the house. When Richard threatens murder, Vernetta must face the fight of her life.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When Pam Dunn finally breaks free from her abusive relationship with Dave, things go from bad to worse as Dave relentlessly stalks and threatens her.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Fear F.M.
programme.desc: K.T. Mills is a popular radio DJ with a friendly voice. But when one deranged listener becomes obsessed with the woman behind the mic, her life is turned upside down.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Andrew Bagby, a Canadian medical student, starts dating fellow student Shirley. But, after Andrew accepts a job in the United States, Shirley isn't ready to let him go.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Date with the Devil
programme.desc: When Ron Ruse breaks up with his controlling girlfriend, Linda, she vows to get him back at any cost. Soon, demands turn to death threats and Ron goes on the run.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: In the Spotlight
programme.desc: A well-respected TV news journalist in San Diego is stalked by a deranged fan who threatens rape and murder if she doesn't follow explicit instructions while on air.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Hopelessly Devoted
programme.desc: When Kaia Anderson is kind to fellow student Robert, she never imagined it will lead to a lifelong obsession that won't be stopped by reason or the law.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Hell Hath No Fury
programme.desc: When George Long's girlfriend demands they get married, he breaks off the relationship. But nothing can stop Cheryl's relentless obsession. If she can't marry him, nobody can.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: The Bonfire
programme.desc: The love triangle between Stephen, Kristin, and LC is becoming more obvious, and each of them is really starting to feel the pressure.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Fast Cars & Fast Women
programme.desc: When LC, Stephen and Trey check out a designer fashion show in LA, LC watches Stephen's attention turn from fashion to fashion models.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Eighteen Candles
programme.desc: When Morgan throws Christina an 18th-birthday bash, she cuts LC and Lo from the guest list, so bumping into them the next day at the nail salon was sweet irony. Christina and Morgan then head to NYC for their spring break trip.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: What Happens In Cabo...
programme.desc: It's spring break in Cabo and anything can happen, especially since LC, Stephen and Kristin are staying in the same hotel. Kristin's wild partying at a club prompts a fight with Stephen, opening the door for him to hook back up with LC.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: The First To Go

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: Myth Hunters

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: Battle of Guadalcanal in WW II was a fiercely contested six-month-long campaign between Allied and Japanese forces, primarily fought on land, sea, and air around the Solomon Islands.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of Peleliu in World War II was a grueling amphibious assault by U.S. forces against heavily fortified Japanese positions on the Pacific island, lasting from September to November 1944 and resulting in significant casualties on both sides.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The fighting on Iwo Jima in WW II involved intense and brutal combat between U.S. Marines and entrenched Japanese forces on a strategically crucial volcanic island in the Pacific.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of Okinawa in WW II was a fierce and prolonged amphibious assault by Allied forces against well-defended Japanese positions on the island, marking the largest and bloodiest battle in the Pacific theater.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The end of World War II in the Pacific was marked by dropping atomic bombs on Hiroshima and Nagasaki in August 1945, prompting Japan's surrender, formalized on September 2, 1945, aboard the USS Missouri, effectively ending the conflict in the Pacific.

programme.title: Armistice

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Superhero for a Day
programme.desc: The half-shelled heroes find themselves competing with Bruce Bent, the Gadgetman, a self-proclaimed superhero from the past.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Back to the Egg
programme.desc: The foursome are dining out on their favourite food when Michelangelo and Leonardo are suddenly transformed into two five year-olds, thanks to Shredder's latest invention - an age-reversing serum.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Son of Return of the Fly II
programme.desc: After escaping from dimensional limbo, the Fly (alias Baxter Stockman) and his computer companion Z employ an experimental solid-energy generator to take over Channel Six.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Knocks 'Em Dead!
programme.desc: House of Ha comedians are disappearing, right in the middle of their acts.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Bebop and Rocksteady Conquer the Universe
programme.desc: When Bebop and Rocksteady steal the Anxietron Ray, they use it to scare the dickens out of everyone in their path, including the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Meets His Match
programme.desc: Billionaire McDonald Crump makes the smallest pizzas in the world, and gives the biggest parties.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Slash - The Evil Turtles from Dimension X
programme.desc: Using some of Shredder's and Krang's supercharged mutagen, Bebop and Rocksteady turn pet turtle Slash into an evil super mutant.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Lightens Up
programme.desc: Tired of constant nagging about discipline, Raphael, Michelangelo and Donatello use a Personality Modifier on Leonardo to get him to lighten up.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Were-Rats of Channel Six
programme.desc: Finding a canister of unstable mutagen, the Rat King turns April and Vernon of Channel Six News into giant were-rats. As the transformed newshounds terrorize the city, Bebop and Rocksteady arrive to collect some explosives for Shredder and Krang.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Funny-They Shrunk Michelangelo
programme.desc: Talbot Breech is short, fussy and the insane inventor of a shrinking ray. His hobby is to miniaturize the biggest ships afloat; only today, he's caught Michelangelo in his diabolical ray.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Big Zipp Attack!
programme.desc: Intent on stealing the Lofty Tower's rigidium spire, Shredder lets a dreaded Zipp loose on the city as a tactical diversion.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire

programme.title: Mona the Vampire

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: In Lava Land, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool using a variety of floating rafts to reach an island named WakiWaki in the middle of the ocean

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Toad Warriors
programme.desc: In the badlands of Car Land, Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad are riding in a brown convertible car, planning on rendezvousing with several Mushroom rebels.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Pied Koopa
programme.desc: In Pasta Land, King Koopa uses a magical flute to lure all of the local Mushroom children away from the town, and leads them to his nearby castle.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Bird! The Bird!
programme.desc: While venturing in a snowy world, Toad is kidnapped by a nearsighted Birdo who is convinced that he is her missing baby.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario of the Deep
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have travelled to the underwater kingdom of Aqua Land in a submarine built from a bathtub in order to fight against BarraKoopa.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario and the Beanstalk
programme.desc: Desperate for cash, the Marios trade the royal cow for bean seeds. Princess scolds them, and accidentally sneezes, blowing the beans into the yard.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Mush Rumors/The Ugly Mermaid
programme.desc: A Family of Real World Humans stray off the vacation path and find themselves lost./In an underwater battle with King Koopa and his Doom Sub, the Brothers find Mev-tropolis.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Great BMX Race
programme.desc: To help Toad pay off his debt to Fry Guy, Mario and Luigi enter a bike race in hopes to collect the prize money. But what they don't know is that it's all a trap planned by Koopa.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Crimes R Us/Life's Ruff
programme.desc: King Koopa and his evil horde orchestrate the escape of an infamous criminal./The mischievous Koopa Kids Hip and Hop snatch King Windbag's magic wand and zap him and Luigi.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario and Joliet
programme.desc: In the Land of Romance, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, who had been called to the Land of Romance by a friend of Princess Toadstool, are currently trapped in a rapidly crumbling building.

programme.title: Hoosiers
programme.desc: A man gets a last-chance job coaching a small-town Indiana high-school basketball team and faces the dual challenge of bringing this underdog team to the 1951 state championship and redeeming himself from a mysterious past.

programme.title: The Heist
programme.desc: Morgan Freeman, Christopher Walken and William H. Macy, star in this slick and witty comedy crime caper.

programme.title: Lost In London
programme.desc: A first-of-its-kind film event which was filmed and screened live simultaneously in select cinemas around the world. The film is loosely based on Woody Harrelson's tabloid-worthy crazy London night-out resulting in him getting in trouble with the law.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: In the woods of Connecticut there's a mountain of money at stake as the world's largest casino pays out the biggest WPT prize pool yet.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: In one of the most eagerly anticipated finals of the year, the charismatic champion "Gambling" Gus Hansen returns to the final table at the Bellagio Five Diamond Poker Classic to defend his title and stake a claim to the $3,000,000 prize pool.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour sets down in the enchanting City of Lights for an international poker mêlée, French-style, as six world-class players from four continents battle for pride, country, and over a million in cash.

programme.title: A Star is Born
programme.desc: A young woman comes to Hollywood with dreams of stardom, but achieves them only with the help of a man whose best days are behind him.

programme.title: Futtock's End
programme.desc: In this silent-style comedy, General Futtock hosts a weekend at his country estate. Chaos erupts as the butler (Sir Michael Hordern) spies on guests, rum spills into the punch, and a lost Japanese tourist adds to the mayhem. Hilarity ensues.

programme.title: The Bat
programme.desc: A crazed killer known as "The Bat" is on the loose in a mansion full of people.

programme.title: The Little Princess
programme.desc: Shirley Temple plays Sara Crewe, the privileged daughter of Captain Reginald Crewe. When the Captain leaves to fight in Africa, Sara is enrolled into an all-girls school in London. All is well until he is reported dead, but Sara thinks he's still alive.

programme.title: 500 mph Storm
programme.desc: When an energy experiment goes haywire, a rash of massive hurricanes rips across North America. A scientist must get his family to safety before the hurricanes merge, creating a "hypercane" with the power to wipe America off the map.

programme.title: Born To Fight
programme.desc: Matthew, the nerdy new kid in town has a passion for boxing and the school bully is the resident boxing champion dominating all opponents, until now.

programme.title: Go for It
programme.desc: Two men meet each other in a strange situation and end up being mistaken for robbers first, for secret service agents later.

programme.title: Loophole
programme.desc: When architect Stephen Booker loses his partnership, he finds jobs hard to come by, and with money in short supply, he unwittingly becomes involved in a daring scheme to rob one of London's biggest bank vaults.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: A County Prosecutor's investigation into the apparent suicide of a pregnant woman is ruled a murder leading her to question suspects at a fertility clinic.

programme.title: Deadly Patient
programme.desc: When Dr. Hillary Spenser saves the life of Gregory Lipton, he becomes dangerously obsessed with her, threatening the good doctor and all those in her life.

programme.title: Frank Herbert's Dune: Episode 3
programme.desc: Paul Atreides, who has become known as Paul Muad'Dib, leads a rebellion against the Harkonnen, who have the secret support of the emperor.

programme.title: Dark Star
programme.desc: In the far reaches of space, a small crew, 20 years into their solitary mission, find things beginning to go hilariously wrong.

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: A scientific researcher who has become unstuck in time must figure out what happened to him and stop the coming end of the world.

programme.title: 40 Days and Nights
programme.desc: When a colossal tectonic shift causes the sea level to start rising, a microbiologist gathers the DNA of as many species as she can, while the military creates an "ark" in a desperate attempt to preserve life on Earth.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Homes, Sweet Homes
programme.desc: A fresh inside peek into some of the Timber Kings most spectacular and unique finished homes and the challenges encountered building them.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Truck Overboard
programme.desc: Joel wrecks an 18-wheeler during a winter build in Ontario, Beat and André sell a thousand year old tree to an eccentric Arkansas millionaire.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Beat’s Arkansas house build is in trouble when delivery trucks arrive out of order, Bryan Jr. remodels a local bar for a penny-pinching friend, and Peter turns inventor to solve a work yard problem.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Heir Apparent
programme.desc: Bryan Jr. takes his son to Missouri and they manage to assemble a house despite themselves, Beat builds a Western-style saloon for a meatball millionaire and his racecar-driving girlfriend.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mark Cromwell and the electricity switch room convoy run into freak weather.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Passage At Arms
programme.desc: A woman is found dead, but was it suicide or murder? A French fencing match provides the telling clue.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Sorcerer
programme.desc: A psychologist is stabbed to death in a seemingly sealed room. Inspector March must find who killed him and how did they accomplish the task.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Present Tense
programme.desc: Colonel March's niece, a believer in spiritualism, hears her dead husband's voice and becomes convinced he has returned as a ghost; but has he?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: At Night All Cats Are Gray
programme.desc: A lady claims an odd man is following her and fears for her life. She’s later found murdered...in mismatched color, a telling clue for the inspector.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Kidnapped Poodle
programme.desc: Colonel March investigates a valuable stolen diamond as well as the kidnapping of a little boy's poodle; he thinks both incidents may be connected.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Invisible Knife
programme.desc: March must solve the mystery of how a man could be stabbed to death by an invisible knife, while attempting to summon The Devil during a black rite.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Strange Event at Roman Fall
programme.desc: A wife reports her husband, a reclusive mystery writer, has fallen off a cliff. Suspicion points to her as the killer and Colonel March investigates.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Headless Hat
programme.desc: While on holiday in France, there is a murder at the docks and Colonel March is asked by a friend of the French police to assist.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Second Mona Lisa
programme.desc: The Second Mona Lisa,' painted six months after the first, is targeted by rival collectors. Colonel March is determined to reveal the truth.

programme.title: A Christmoose Story
programme.desc: A large moose crashes through the roof of young Max's garage! A moose who talks! A moose who claims to work for Santa!

programme.title: Megan's Christmas Miracle
programme.desc: When Megan is taken away from the only life she’s ever known and moves to a small town in West Virginia, she struggles to fit in. She also gives up her one true passion, dancing. But the nativity at her local church might just turn her life around

programme.title: A Beauty And The Beast Christmas
programme.desc: Social Media influencer Ginger Holiday is convinced by her agent to fake a romance with viral bad boy Beau Bradley to gain more followers. Initially they can't stand each other but the feelings they had to fake might just be turning into something real.

programme.title: Under the Mistletoe
programme.desc: Starring Jaime Ray Newman, Michael Shanks, and Conan Graham. At Christmas, the tables turn on a selfless single mom when a local radio station takes over her love life after an innocent call from her 8-year-old son.

programme.title: 1990 FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: Football entertainment for fans! Watch documentaries, original series and select live matches as well as historic moments from the FIFA World Cup™️, FIFA Club World Cup™️, FIFA Women's World Cup™️ and more.

programme.title: FACTS
programme.desc: Argentina outlasts the Netherlands in a fever-pitch showdown in Buenos Aires.

programme.title: 2022 FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: Watch the full match replay between England and IR Iran played at Khalifa International Stadium.

programme.title: 1986 FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: Watch the full match replay from the match between England and Poland played at Estadio Tecnologico, Monterrey on Wednesday, 11 June 1986.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy and Sam return to work; Andy is attacked at Traci's apartment and the Sex Crimes Unit tries to take over the case.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy contemplates her future with Sam after learning of heartbreaking news; she meets a teenager in need of protection.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A riot erupts at an over-capacity women's correctional facility while Andy, Juliet, Nick and Gail transfer inmates; a dangerous prisoner tries to prove her innocence to a trapped Andy and Juliet.

programme.title: Empire State
programme.desc: A security guard (Liam Hemsworth) and his childhood pal (Michael Angarano) make plans to rob an armored car.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker legends compete in a one-day spectacular at Connexin Live, Hull. Groups A and B, Stephen Hendry vs Tony Drago and Barry Pinches vs Igor Figueiredo.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker legends compete in a one-day spectacular at Connexin Live, Hull. It is Semi-Final time! Ken Doherty Vs Jimmy White and Tony Drago Vs Igor Figueiredo.

programme.title: The Crucible Cup
programme.desc: Live Snooker 900, the new fast and exciting version of the game featuring many of the game’s legendary players in weekly competitions.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony takes a tough four-day trek through the Kintail region of the Highlands to discover the incredible story of the Jacobite Uprisings of the early 1700s.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony travels along the first 50 miles of the iconic Liverpool-Leeds canal to Wigan Pier, uncovering some extraordinary Georgian and Victorian stories along the way.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson takes a 45-mile hike through the beautiful countryside of the Weald in Kent and East Sussex, discovering its rich and surprising Tudor heritage.

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts tells the story of the Civil War by studying the history of Oxford, a city that was under siege during the battles that would change British warfare forever.

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Roman Chester: Alice tells the story of Roman Britain by studying the history of Chester. She enjoys an authentic Roman feast and checks out an archaeological discovery.

programme.desc: When three young women age and die within hours, a small town is turned upside down. How does Helen (Maxine Miller), a doctor's aging mother, play into these deaths? The answer to the puzzling mystery of fragile youth is soon to be revealed.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: On a desperate mission to survive, a young military cadet (Will Wheaton) learns the difference between heroic ideals and the bitter realities of war as he and his dying comrades prepare a strike against the aliens who may have condemned them to death.

programme.title: Double Exposure

programme.title: Dr. Crippen

programme.title: The Rainbow Jacket

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast

programme.title: Matlock: The Temptation

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter

programme.desc: Codslow suffers under three immortal tyrants. The pilgrims aid a family against the rulers who draw power from pearls, paper, and wine. Pigsy nearly roasts before Monkey devises a plan to free the land.

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Only experimental spinal surgery can save sniper victim Brown from paralysis; guests Vic Morrow, E.G. Marshall.

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Judi Buenoano secretly murdered lovers to claim on insurance policies whilst nurse Genene Jones secretly killed at least 46 infants left in her care between 1980 and 1982.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a tragic murder led agents into the frightening world of domestic terrorism. Law enforcement vowed to dismantle the violent faction that claimed responsibility.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mother's Intuition
programme.desc: 14-year-old Pamela Bischoff misses her curfew on April 12, 1991. Though she has only been missing a few hours, her mother, Gail, tells the Oromocto RCMP she is certain Pamela has been raped and murdered by an older boy named Billy Stillman.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Winston's Secret
programme.desc: In April 1996, Winston Malcolm is rescued from icy waters of a lake after a canoe accident. He announced to hospital staff that his wife was with him. A dive team is called to the rescue, and the body of Jan Marshall is finally found a few days later.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Jutta Weber is last seen on August 6, 1997. In August 1999, Don Gazley is arrested and wants to cut a deal: if the police make his charges go away, he’ll tell them where Jutta Weber’s body is. Is Gazley telling the truth?

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Bad Trip
programme.desc: On August 20, 2001, Charles Tremblay, 15, was beaten, then thrown into the St-Charles River where he drowned. Tremblay's body was discovered in the mud less than 24 hours after his death.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: House of Horrors
programme.desc: The body of a woman is found floating next to a dock. The case takes the detectives into a sinister world from which few come out unharmed.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: After finding the body of a young girl in a stream located in the suburbs of Montreal, investigators strive to retrace a murderer who knew how to use water to his advantage.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Wasted Youth
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Signed In Blood
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Military Justice
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Scent Of The Kill
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Body in the Freezer
programme.desc: A meeting between two businessmen leaves one shot in the face. Things seem cut and dry until Lt. Kenda realizes the “victim” could actually be the aggressor, shot struggling over his own gun.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Married To The Job

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters

programme.desc: A Pennsylvania tavern is haunted by a mobster who was gunned down there 81 years ago.

programme.title: My Ghost Story

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.desc: Chef Martin Yan judges six Chinese dishes created by the remaining contestants; during dinner service, one team disappoints a VIP guest; a contestant is eliminated.

programme.desc: Big Dee Dee’s baby shower turns cold when Mona feels her confidence has been betrayed after learning that Dee Dee has told her cousin Barbara (guest star Shari Headley) that Mona’s relationship problems stem from her mother’s bitterness

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big How The Ex Stole Christmas Episode

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Fall Guys
programme.desc: The pressures of running a shop are taking a toll on Ton and Allen and not even the discovery of a stunt-man's fall bag can ease the tension. When things get heated, Ton abandons the partnership and leaves town.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: You Foos You Lose
programme.desc: When their truck breaks down, Ton and Allen lay it all on the line to raise money to fix her. They score a Foosball table, Tommy Gun drums and to Ton's delight, a treasure trove of Twinkies, but will it be enough?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Haff-Inated
programme.desc: Allen's off his game without his morning coffee, but some fun items help him re-energize. The guys find a wrestling ring, and when Allen uncovers vintage animatronics, they remind him of his days as a theme park boat captain.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Unsinkable Ton
programme.desc: Unique finds lead the guys to some cool sales. They try to authenticate props from the film Titanic, Ton faces off with a rattler during a snakebite kit sale, and Allen gets into ice carving while unloading some chainsaws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Jersey Score
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Betsy's Last Stand
programme.desc: With their beloved bread truck on life support, Ton and Allen head to an auction to help save her. Will an industrial grinder and a classic Chevy be enough to mend Betsy, or will the guys be forced to say goodbye for good?

programme.title: A Haunting: Darkness Follows

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang and the gang discover an Earth town that celebrates `Avatar Day'. They learn that it is not a celebration of the Avatar, but a festival of anger for something Aang did in his past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: In search for an Earthbending teacher for Aang, the kids go to an underground Earthbending tournament where they encounter Toph, a blind, but powerful Earthbender.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher. Meanwhile, Sokka gets himself in a jam.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Paranormal Mysteries

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Jump Start

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Ice Man

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Trouble in Paradise

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Girl Power
programme.desc: When Dog decides to spend the day caring for his newest granddaughter, Beth enlists the girls to hunt down a female fugitive. Heading into a dangerous part of town the ladies will use their feminine wiles to track this mother gone wrong.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Family Ties

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two investigative journalists and a natural health practitioner who maintain vaccines are neither safe nor effective.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SACRED BUILDINGS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at the sacred places and buildings of ancient and medieval people including the Great Pyramid of Giza, Chartres Cathedral, Derinkuyu Underground City, Santiago de Compostela Catherdral.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Was Presidential hopeful, Robert F. Kennedy really killed by disgruntled Palestinian Sirhan Sirhan as we’ve been led to believe? Or was he another in a long line of Manchurian candidates, a victim of a long standing mind control program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: The legend of the werewolf throughout history and in various cultures is explored. The Conspiracy Show travels to England and rural Wisconsin to investigate claims of actual werewolf sightings.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: Richard investigates a legendary naval military experiment said to have been carried out at the Philadelphia Naval Shipyard in October 1943.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Did Jim Morrison Fake His Death?
programme.desc: Is it conceivable that the Doors legendary front man did not die in a bathtub in Paris of an apparent drug overdose?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Assassination of John Lennon
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show travels to New York, LA and Toronto in order to investigate the murder of John Lennon. Several researchers posit that Lennon's supposed killer Mark David Chapman was either a patsy or a mind-controlled assassin.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: For 2000 years, seekers have hunted Noah's Ark, believed to save Earth from biblical flood wrath. US creationists seek it on Turkey's Mount Ararat, aiming to refute evolution. This documentary tracks three Christian explorers whose searches ended sadly.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SCIENCE AND MYSTERIES FOR 21. CENTURY
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at some of the mysteries of modern science including memory of water, reincarnation, the beginning of life, hypnosis, the secrets of Morphic fields, time travel, why we must sleep.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Natural History Museum, London
programme.desc: From Darwin’s original specimens to a lost workshop that inspired James Bond, discover the secrets of Britain’s Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the American Museum of Natural History, New York
programme.desc: From a dinosaur embryo that solves a murder mystery to a spacecraft catching a comet’s tail, discover the secrets inside the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Egyptian Museum
programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto
programme.desc: From a medieval hand-grenade to an extremely rare dinosaur, discover the secrets inside the Royal Ontario Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre
programme.desc: From murdered kings to stolen masterpieces, discover the secrets inside the Louvre.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE
programme.desc: When it comes to disasters, mother nature has mankind beat. However, as mankind expands, evolves and technology advances, it comes with dangerous challenges. When errors are made or unforeseen circumstances occur, the results can be devastating.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of A Hurricane
programme.desc: Hurricanes are one of the most destructive weather events to strike our planet and have the same power as a nuclear weapon.

programme.title: Naked Science: Super Flares - Could They Cause Mass Extinction?
programme.desc: Superflares are amongst the greatest events of the Universe. These magnetic explosions can release energy millions of times greater than atomic bombs. They produce streams of highly energetic particles which can be highly destructive to life.

programme.title: scienceNOW: How Does the Brain Work?
programme.desc: Hosted by Neil deGrasse Tyson, examine these topics: Magic and the Brains; Can a Machine Think Like Us?; Magnetic Mind Control; and a profile of neuroscientist David Eagleman, who studies time perception and synesthesia.

programme.title: Naked Science: Atmosphere

programme.title: Arthur: The Boy With His Head In The Clouds/More!

programme.title: Arthur: April 9th

programme.title: Arthur: Do You Speak George?/World Girls
programme.desc: Everyone at school is speaking their own made-up language, and George can't make sense of what anyone is saying. And it's the grand opening of World Girl World, which sells dolls from every country, and every girl in town is thrilled!

programme.title: Arthur: The Friend Who Wasn't There/Surprise!
programme.desc: Muffy embarks on a quest to find her long lost imaginary friend. And then it's Catherine's 16th birthday, and Francine has been cordially UN-invited to the party.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'S Library Card/Arthur's Big Hit
programme.desc: When D.W. discovers that she can get her own library card, she rejoices at the world of books waiting for her. And, is it ever okay to hit someone? Sometimes you just get so mad, you wanna....pow! Right??

programme.title: Arthur: Ants in Arthur's Pants/Don't Ask Muffy
programme.desc: To excel in science, the class has to prove that they have P.A.N.T.S.--the ability to be patient, attentive, nosy, thoughtful, and systematic. And Muffy starts an advice column to launch her career as a rich and famous talk-show host.

programme.title: Oppenheimer: The Real Story
programme.desc: The documentary covers Oppenheimer's contribution to nuclear physics as a professor and leader of the Los Alamos Laboratory.

programme.title: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: To commemorate the 70th Anniversary of the Battle of Britain Ewan and Colin McGregor take to the skies to discover how; against the odds, the RAF inflicted Hitler's first defeat of WW2.

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: A Day of Infamy
programme.desc: December 7th, 1941 Pearl Harbor was attacked by the Empire of Japan. Now the people who were there share their memories of that fateful day.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: HE-111: Germany’s Frontline Bomber
programme.desc: The Heinkel He 111 is one of the most recognised German aircraft of WW2. The broad winged design was a guinea pig for future bombers, with more variants than any other military aircraft of the time.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Bomb: Episode 2
programme.desc: Did Nazi uranium make it to Japan in the final months of WW2? Were the Axis powers closer to a bomb than we think? Drama unfolds as experts shed new light on the hardships, challenges and secrets of a war-torn, pre-nuclear world.

programme.title: Guns That Changed The Game: Rise Of The Machines
programme.desc: Rise of the Machines: While the single shot rifle remained a mainstay until WWI, machine guns had been in development since the final days of the American Civil War.

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers: The Wrens
programme.desc: When Gilbert Roberts arrives to set up a tactical school for the U-boats, he receives a frosty reception from Admiral Noble. Enlisting the help of Jean Laidlaw and a small team of Wrens, Roberts begins unpicking the flaws in Walker’s ‘Buttercup’.

programme.title: WWII Air Crash Detectives
programme.desc: In the early hours of 8th July 1944, a normally quiet part of rural Northamptonshire was a hive of activity as the 17 twinned engine Wellington bombers rumbled down the runway of their Turweston airfield home.

programme.title: Dictators' Hideouts

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter

programme.desc: Pigsy searches for a missing girl, finding she’s married to a slug monster. Disguised as the slug, he lives with vain Hai-Min—until she notices her husband isn’t so slimy after all.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In a volcanic land plagued by quakes, a catfish demon and a faceless shape-changer fight. A priest claims one pilgrim is the impostor. Distrust splits the group apart.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims meet a man digging a mountain tunnel for 22 years. Tripitaka insists they help, but Monkey’s magic shortcut angers him. Banished Monkey leaves them vulnerable to grave danger.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The King of Unicorns seeks Monkey’s magic staff as a gift. Using a magic ring, he captures Tripitaka and weakens Monkey. Pigsy, tempted by Chun-Shou, must resist to save his master.

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A documentary filmmaker (Joe Don Baker) falls for Fran while filming her during a murder investigation.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A Japanese ideogram provides the key to finding a package stolen from a woman (Sian Barbara Allen) after her father's death.

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.desc: A teenager waiting for her friends to give her a ride home from work suddenly disappears. When her friends arrive, they find terrifying evidence of her abduction.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Odd Couples
programme.desc: Oscar and Felix seek the advice of a counselor in their apartment building to help overcome their issues.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Felicity Paget was killed by a mystery knifeman who entered her house, and also attacked her fiancé William Webb. The fleeing attacker left footprints behind in blood.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: John Kewish was the last person to be hanged for murder on the Isle of Man in August 1872. Yet, the case continues to create controversy to this day.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: In the 1990s, electrician Tony Teare lured Corrine Bentley to remote moorland in the UK, promising her a job. In the violent attack that followed, he left her for dead.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Already a wanted criminal in Canada, fraudster Albert Walker fled to the UK and assumed the identity of a man who would become his business partner - Ronald Platt.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Sylvie Darcy Case
programme.desc: On February 26th 2012, in the Yevelines. Around 11PM policemen are called for an assault in a parking lot in the forest of Saint-Lambet-des-Bois.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Killer Cop (Tavernier Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Night of Horror at Devil's Plateau (Marie-Jeanne Meyer Case)
programme.desc: On June 18, 2011, Marie-Jeanne Meyer, 17-years old, waved goodbye to her sister before leaving for her daily jog on the heights of Tournon in Ardèche. Three days later, her mutilated body was found in a freshly dug pit, near an area known to be cursed.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Key to the Enigma (Farid Ouzzane Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Pierre and Gabrielle Labrell Case

programme.title: The Case: The Perpignan Station Murders

programme.title: The Case: The Treiber Affair

programme.title: The Case: Deadly Insurance
programme.desc: A drawer affair where women multiply around a modern bluebeard.

programme.title: The Case: Marseille Connection
programme.desc: In pursuit of the former members of the French Connection who were preparing a major coup between South America, Spain and the south of France.

programme.title: The Case: Heist of the Century (Christophe Korell)

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: When a young woman is out for a run she is brutally attacked and raped by a stranger. Police use groundbreaking genetic genealogy to identify the perpetrator.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Salt Lake City, 2010, Sherry Black is found stabbed to death in her bookshop. Police fail to identify her killer until advanced DNA science reignites the case.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Patient Killer
programme.desc: In 1976, thirteen-year-old schoolgirl Tracey Ann Patient was plucked off Auckland's Great North Road. The following morning, her body was found dumped 16 km away in the Waitakere Ranges, having been strangled with a pantyhose tourniquet.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: In 1957, nine-year-old Peter Boland was on holiday having the time of his life on a remote farm in New Zealand when he simply vanished without a trace. Peter’s older brother Gavin Boland, a self-confessed sceptic, turns to Sensing Murder’s psychics.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 3
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Viva Las Vegas
programme.desc: Joan hears wedding bells – but are they all in her mind?

programme.title: Girlfriends: Between Brock and a Hard Place

programme.title: Girlfriends: Don't You Want Me Baby?
programme.desc: When Toni revisits the past, it could destroy her future with Todd.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Merry Ex-Mas
programme.desc: Maya claims she’s over Darnell – but is she?

programme.title: Girlfriends: Prophet and Loss
programme.desc: Joan and William are haunted by the words of a stranger who’s either a psychic – or a psycho.

programme.title: Girlfriends: A Comedy of Eros

programme.title: Girlfriends: Leggo My Ego
programme.desc: Toni’s obsessed with meeting supermodel Beverly Johnson.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: UNFORGIVEN
programme.desc: Nineteen years ago, Kim’s birth divided Nikki and her father; now, only Kim can mend their family feud.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: It’s A Spring Bling Thing
programme.desc: While Kim, T and Stevie rock Palm Springs, Nikki goes on the 'Road Trip from Hell' with Professor Oglevee

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Get Me To The Church On Time
programme.desc: Kim is getting married...over Nikki’s dead body.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Since I Lost My Baby
programme.desc: Nikki and Veronica team up to break up Professor Oglevee’s new romance.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Pet Cemetery
programme.desc: Ryan and his team investigate the bizarre haunting of a woman and her dog in Waterboro, Maine. The Labrador was chewing at her own fur and standing on guard on the bed, growling at unseen figures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Bedroom Eyes
programme.desc: PRS travels to rural Pennsylvania to investigate a haunting that began after a new couple moved into an old family farm.?Over the next three days, hidden tragedies are uncovered and latent psychic abilities are revealed.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jimmie is haunted by the apparition of a mysterious old woman who peers at him in the bathroom of his family's Petersburg, VA home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vegas
programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Messenger
programme.desc: Kelli and her husband Riley are frightened in their coastal Oregon home. They are plagued by a headless apparition and often hear mysterious noises that resemble cries for help from the dark corners of their house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Suicide Possession
programme.desc: Joan and her boyfriend Tony are seeing apparitions in their New Jersey home. Both are concerned that the spirits are influencing their behavior: a non-drinker, Tony has turned to the bottle while Joan has thoughts of harming herself.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Anniversary
programme.desc: Ever since a close-knit Kentucky family moved into their new home, they've been visited by the spirit of a young girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hell's Gate
programme.desc: Ever since Wes and his family moved into their new home in York, PA they've been struggling with a dark force that's made everyday a living hell. Wes feels his mental and physical health is in jeopardy.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Glove
programme.desc: When a terrifying haunting threatens to break a Daisytown, PA couple apart, PRS is their last resort. As the investigation deepens, PRS and the family learn that it's just the tip of iceberg, turns out this haunting might be all in the family.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Todmoredon Church
programme.desc: For the first time Yvette takes her fearless Most Haunted team to an ordained church and graveyard. But it’s the cellar that proves the most fearful as the team get caught in a small room and they are not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Weir Mill
programme.desc: Yvette take her team to an abandoned mill where spirits are said to roam and satanic ritual taken place. What awaits them is an evening of fear that causes one of the team to leave early.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Ripon Workhouse
programme.desc: In a place where the homeless were kept and work was hard, death was often the only escape but it seems that wasn’t the way for some as their souls are said to roam this place.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Ripon Prison
programme.desc: A small prison in Yorkshire gives a big impact when Yvette and her team attempt to stay the night. Although many inmates were released some are still locked up and they are not happy.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Standon Hall Part 1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and her team take on a three-part investigation that tests them to the very core. A place that surprised intrigued and terrified the hardened team, making Standon Hall the most fearful place they have investigated.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Standon Hall Part 2
programme.desc: Part two of this mammoth investigation and Yvette has some harsh words for Karl as he decides to take a risk that proves too dangerous. With something that wants them out, the investigation gets aggressive.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: E-Mail, Cup of Joe, Secret of the Family Tomb, Wheezer, The Unknown Patient.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Bracelet
programme.desc: Encouraged by her popular support after the shooting, Alexis decides to stay in the race; Sean speeds his plan to use the Vitron oil deal to crush Alexis; Karen is unnerved by the return of her ex-husband.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Warning
programme.desc: Tired of Leslie's threats to expose his true identity, Sean plants a poisonous snake in her room as a warning of who she is dealing with; having second thoughts about accepting Adam's bribe to stay away from Karen, Jesse gives the money back.

programme.title: Dynasty: Adam's Son
programme.desc: Karen is rushed to the hospital to the hospital as she goes into labor; after Sean threatens Leslie, she confides in Dex, Sean's true identity; Dex warns Alexis that Sean may be seeking vengeance against her as she listens in horror.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Scandal
programme.desc: Alexis warns Blake about Sean's true identity. Concerned for his family's safety, Blake and Dex go to Natumbre to uncover Sean's mysterious scheme involving the Vitron oil deal.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Trial
programme.desc: Following the explosion in Natumbre, Blake is accused of dealing in illegal arms; Alexis uncovers proof that Sean paid Jesse to return to Denver so he could persuade Karen to keep Adam's baby.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Proposal
programme.desc: Dana tries desperately to convince Adam how much she wants their son. She proposes that if they were a loving couple again, the judge would find in their favor. Still hurting from her outburst in court, Adam is cold to her pleas.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bride
programme.desc: Casey poses as a young peasant girl from Europe imported to be the bride of Joe Corvin, the top man at getting underworld millions into Swiss banks.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Stone Pillow
programme.desc: Guest star Bradford Dillman plays Edison, a former private detective turned extortionist who is blackmailing a powerful crime chief with a roll of film linking him to murder.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Image
programme.desc: Barney assumes the identity of a powerful psychic from a Caribbean island kingdom in order to hypnotize a defecting crime syndicate leader into revealing his super secret list of government officials on the take.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Committed
programme.desc: Nora Dawson, a witness to a murder, is committed to an asylum and is being systematically driven out of her mind with drugs when the IMF team is given twenty-four hours to save her life.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Bag Woman
programme.desc: Posing as a bag woman for a crooked politician, Casey unknowingly carries an attached case locked to her wrist filled with both money and a bomb set to explode upon opening.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Betsy's Last Stand
programme.desc: With their beloved bread truck on life support, Ton and Allen head to an auction to help save her. Will an industrial grinder and a classic Chevy be enough to mend Betsy, or will the guys be forced to say goodbye for good?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Big Crush
programme.desc: The guys battle it out with their fierce former-employee, while a shill bidder threatens to ruin the day. When all hope seems lost, a set of monster truck tires and a mystery box are their last chance to come out on top.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Carnies & Armories
programme.desc: A tough group of bidders team up to take down Ton and Allen at auction. After a couple of wins, the guys try to sell an arsenal used by Native Americans and some vintage carnival gear. But will they get conned?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: It's Raining Ton
programme.desc: The guys take Big Sis to her first auction - and when things get ugly, she becomes their secret weapon. Ton tests out a "blob" and Allen gets shot with a riot gun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to a Hollywood auction and face a new competitor with a seemingly endless cash flow. After they uncover a triple barrel shotgun and an antique camel saddle, Allen confronts an old childhood fear.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Multiple Spirit Disorder
programme.desc: Watch as spirits and shadowy figures plague three different family’s lives.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Territorial Ghosts
programme.desc: Witness the terror that ensues when ghosts deal with invaders on their turf.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: Watch harrowing tales of supernatural beings who are bent on causing pain.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Child Victims
programme.desc: An angry spirit torments a young boy, and a spooky guest crashes a party.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Return of the Dead
programme.desc: Tour a haunted house and see the deadly outcome of a spirit’s search for family.

programme.title: A Haunting: Norman the Doll
programme.desc: Paranormal investigator, Stephen Lancaster, doesn’t believe in haunted objects until he captures proof the doll he recently acquired is haunted. Fearing he is in over his head, he attempts to get rid of it, but the doll has other plans.

programme.title: A Haunting: Nightmare Upstairs
programme.desc: The VanLandingham family moves to a larger house in the small town of Wynne, Arkansas. What they first consider "house-settling" noise and behavior quickly turns into a full-scale supernatural physical attack on both daughters Brianna and Heather.

programme.title: A Haunting: Where Demons Dwell
programme.desc: Young David suffers from intense nightmares and is physically attacked by an invisible entity.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Soldier
programme.desc: An enigmatic photo of her boyfriend’s brother killed in Vietnam entrances Lisa.

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Victorian
programme.desc: After moving in their dream home, Edwin Gonzalez and Lillian Otero begin to experience strange occurrences; mysterious footsteps and unexplained noises. Lillian is physically attacked while sleeping and the couple tries to escape, but is it too late?

programme.title: A Haunting: Ashes To Evil
programme.desc: Soon after moving in a large apartment in Hampton, Tennessee, Amelia’s family can’t shake the feeling that they are not alone. An evil entity lurks in their dream home and is targeting family members. They turn to paranormal investigators for help.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: Aang discovers a colossal Fire Nation invention heading for Ba Sing Se, and the kids must stop it before it destroys the great wall that protects the city.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang and the kids finally arrive in Ba Sing Se to see the Earth King, only to find mysterious forces within the city conspiring to stop them.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: A series of short stories that explore the individual adventures of Katara and Toph, Uncle, Sokka, Aang, Zuko, and Momo.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: In this special episode, we go back in time to the moment Appa was stolen.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: While searching for Appa, the kids run into Jet but are torn about whether to trust him or not. Meanwhile, Zuko also hunts for Appa.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids battle Long Feng when they try to show the Earth King the conspiracy taking place in his city. Zuko becomes seriously ill and has odd dreams as he faces a spiritual crisis.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: A guru at the Eastern Air Temple helps Aang take the next step in his Avatar journey. Plus, Sokka meets his long-lost father, Azula hatches a diabolical plan, and Uncle and Zuko open a tea shop.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Everyone races against time to stop Azula's sinister conquest of Ba Sing Se. Zuko and Katara spend time together, while Aang's destiny hangs in the balance, as does Zuko's.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: After sustaining serious injuries, Aang awakens to find himself aboard a Fire Nation ship. Meanwhile, Zuko journeys home.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: To better camouflage themselves as real Fire Nation citizens, the kids check out a Fire Nation school. Also, Zuko confronts Uncle.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Ancient Mysteries
programme.desc: Ancient Mysteries: A girl finds a 1000-year-old skull that may prove aliens once walked the planet, and ancient stone carvings could rewrite the story of evolution.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Amazing Survival
programme.desc: Amazing Survival: Incredible stories of people who cheated death, including a man who escaped from the avalanche of debris caused by the collapse of the World Trade Center.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Man Beasts
programme.desc: Man Beasts: We're all fascinated by mysteries. But is the unexplained really unexplainable? William Shatner investigates in an attempt to find a logical explanation.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Aliens Walk Among Us
programme.desc: Stories that suggest aliens are among us, including an Arizona woman who claims to have been fathered by an alien in a top-secret government experiment.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Curses
programme.desc: Curses: Do cursed objects really exist? This episode explores a painting in Britain that is said to start deadly house fires, a sinister doll in Florida and a curse-proof house.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Weird Animal Behaviour
programme.desc: Weird Animal Behaviour: Three extraordinary stories about the supersensory power of animals, including a psychic octopus that correctly predicted multiple World Cup winners.
